texts.title: Delphic maxim — γνῶθι σεαυτόν (Post 3)
texts.source: Attributed to Chilon of Sparta; preserved in Diogenes Laertius Lives of the Eminent Philosophers 1.40; https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Know_thyself (CC BY-SA 3.0)
texts.pronunciation_confidence: high — scholarly consensus on Classical restitution
